name: parallax
description: Spec-driven blind-coder TDD workflow with independent verification, fail-closed gates, and provider fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Fail-closed blind-coder TDD with independent verification
interface.longDescription: A spec-driven workflow that separates test-writing, implementation, arbitration, provider limits, and independent verification.
defaultPrompt: Use Parallax to plan and verify this feature.
Run a Parallax limits check for configured providers.
Review this change with Parallax's fail-closed gates.
